member.name: M:Node.#ctor(Node,BaseNodeAddress)
member.summary: Constructor for a node that verifies certificates.
member.param: the address as a managed node address

member.name: M:Node.#ctor(AccountId,BaseNodeAddress,ExecutorService)
member.param: the address as a managed node address

member.name: M:Node.ToSecure
member.summary: Create a secure version of this node
member.returns: the secure version of the node

member.name: M:Node.ToInsecure
member.summary: Create an insecure version of this node
member.returns: the insecure version of the node

member.name: P:Node.AddressBookEntry
member.summary: Extract the address book. This kind of shadows the address field inherited from BaseNode. This is only needed for the cert hash
